race.description: Bet365 Gold Cup Handicap Chase (Premier Handicap) (GBB Race)
race.comment: IN D'OR (7) has been lightly raced this season and clearly been targeted for this contest. Ran well when third behind a progressive rival at Ascot in January and now holds every chance tackling the trip. MONTREGARD (11) won twice at Ascot this season including a triumph in the G3 Swinley Handicap Chase last time out. Non-runner in the Scottish National last week. Holds strong claims. LIVIN ON LUCO (13) relished staying races this year when finishing fourth in the G3 Welsh National at Chepstow and a narrow second at Exeter. One to take seriously. Willie Mullins provides a sole representative in ROAD TO HOME (4). Respect.
